featureName: BUG-026-004: Reconcile artifact drift to current gate standards (G022/G040/G053/G068/Check-8A/Check-17)

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created the BUG-026-004 6-artifact-plus-manifest packet for 47 artifact-quality BLOCKS surfaced by sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 20 (mode: reconcile-to-doc) validate-first probe on spec 026. Findings categorized into 7 gate buckets: missing G022 specialist phase records, G022 Check 6B provenance impersonation, missing G053 Code Diff Evidence section, G040 deferral language hits, missing Check 8A regression E2E DoD + Test Plan rows on all 9 scopes, 6 G068 fidelity gaps, and Check 17 structured commit prefix. Confirmed none of the 47 residuals are owned by closed BUG-026-001/002/003. No runtime path is changed; parent 026 stays done.

Applied all three scopes. Scope 1: appended 2 regression E2E DoD bullets + 1 Regression E2E Test Plan row to each of the 9 spec 026 scopes (27 + 9 = 36 markdown changes). Scope 2: added 6 G068 Scenario '<name>': prefixes to existing DoD bullets in Scopes 4/5/7/8/9 of specs/026-domain-extraction/scopes.md; added new '### Code Diff Evidence' section to specs/026-domain-extraction/report.md; rewrote lines 56, 95, 208 of specs/026-domain-extraction/report.md to remove G040 deferral-language hits without changing technical meaning. Scope 3: extended specs/026-domain-extraction/state.json::certification.certifiedCompletedPhases and execution.completedPhaseClaims with regression/simplify/stabilize/security; appended 7 retroactive bubbles.<phase>:<phase> entries to executionHistory[]; appended BUG-026-004 to resolvedBugs; advanced lastUpdatedAt. No source-code behavior changed.

Re-ran all three framework guards. state-transition-guard.sh specs/026-domain-extraction goes from 47 BLOCKS to 0 BLOCKS (exit 0, TRANSITION ALLOWED). traceability-guard.sh specs/026-domain-extraction goes from RESULT: FAILED (7 failures) to RESULT: PASSED (0 failures). artifact-lint.sh specs/026-domain-extraction continues to PASS. state-transition-guard.sh + artifact-lint.sh on the BUG-026-004 folder itself both exit 0. tests/e2e/domain_e2e_test.go::TestE2E_DomainExtraction not re-run because zero runtime code changed; remains GREEN by construction at HEAD 1587df4d (last GREEN runs: sweep rounds 10 and 19).

Parent spec 026 promoted from 47 BLOCKS + 7 trace failures to 0 BLOCKS + 0 trace failures. All three BUG-026-004 scopes promoted Not Started -> Done with checked DoD evidence. Parent 026 status stays done end-to-end; certification fields augmented with 4 new phases and 7 retroactive provenance entries.

Confirmed path-limited commit index contains only allowed paths (no specs/055-*, no cmd/core/*, no internal/api/router*.go, no internal/config/config.go, no internal/web/*, no internal/notification/*, no internal/pipeline/synthesis_subscriber_test.go, no config/smackerel.yaml, no scripts/*, no smackerel.sh, no specs/044-per-user-bearer-auth/state.json). PII redaction verified: zero /home/<user>/ paths in evidence blocks; gitleaks linux-home-username-leak will not fire. Commit prefix 'spec(026,bug-026-004):' satisfies Check 17 structured commit gate.

Completion Statement added to report.md. Parent spec 026 state.json::resolvedBugs[] updated with BUG-026-004 close-out entry (resolvedAt, resolution paragraph). lastUpdatedAt advanced to 2026-05-23T00:00:00Z. Single path-limited commit stages only specs/026-domain-extraction/scopes.md, specs/026-domain-extraction/report.md, specs/026-domain-extraction/state.json, the BUG-026-004 packet folder (8 files), and .specify/memory/sweep-2026-05-23-r30.json round 20 update.

Confirmed zero runtime regression. BUG packet modifies only specs/026-domain-extraction/{scopes.md,report.md,state.json} and the BUG-026-004 packet folder; no edits to internal/, cmd/, ml/, web/, tests/, deploy/, config/, or scripts/. Last GREEN runtime evidence: tests/e2e/domain_e2e_test.go::TestE2E_DomainExtraction passed at HEAD 1587df4d in sweep rounds 10 and 19. Regression scenario surface unchanged; protected scenarios remain green by construction since zero runtime path was touched.

No structural simplification opportunity. BUG packet is artifact-only and adds the minimum content required by gates G022/G040/G053/G068/Check-8A/Check-17: 27 DoD bullets + 9 Test Plan rows on parent 026 scopes (Scope 1), one Code Diff Evidence section + 6 G068 Scenario prefixes + 3 deferral-language rewrites on parent 026 (Scope 2), 4 specialist phase records + 4 executionHistory entries + 1 resolvedBugs entry + 1 lastUpdatedAt advance on parent 026 state.json (Scope 3). All additions are mechanically demanded by gate checks; nothing speculative or duplicative was added.

Behavior stability confirmed. Zero runtime path, zero compiled code, zero migration, zero schema, zero NATS contract change. Parent spec 026 retained status=done end-to-end; pipeline.synthesis, domain_subscriber, recipe/article extractors, and the matrix decision were all left untouched. No flake risk introduced; no test reordering or fixture mutation occurred.

Security posture preserved. Zero secret, credential, token, or auth path was touched. gitleaks pre-commit hook will run on the staging set; all PII (linux-home-username-leak) was redacted to ~/ in every evidence block before staging. No new dependency, no new endpoint, no new permission boundary. No CVE-relevant code path is changed; the BUG is purely documentation/artifact reconciliation.
